name: BB:FalsePositive: RPC Server False Positive Events
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive QIDs that occur to or from RPC servers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: RPC Servers building block.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: RPC Server False Positive Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when we see an event match any of the following BB:HostDefinition: RPC Servers
the event QID is one of the following (1159448) Custom User 9 - Event CRE
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: RPC Server False Positive Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
